google-ads.title: 02 Google Ads
google-ads.last_task: Verify Google Ads live account and delivery state
google-ads.last_summary: Read lane memory/control graph and live HE Google Ads APIs. Verified account customer 368-171-0084 via hamzaexpress.in API; active Search campaigns are Late Night 23854158442 ₹300/day, Dinner 23855561197 ₹150/day, Brand 23845870050 ₹50/day, all ENABLED/SERVING; PMax 23834053403 remains PAUSED at ₹300/day. 7d cockpit shows ₹2301.14 spend and 70 clicks, almost entirely Late Night; Dinner/Brand enabled but not materially delivering. Campaign criteria show HE pin proximity only: Late Night 7km, Dinner 3km, Brand 5km, PMax 2km; no city LOCATION criteria. Directions proof endpoint live with today's page_view/maps_auto_open events, currently from Meta UTMs rather than Google gclid. No ad mutation performed.
google-ads.next_action: Before any mutation, verify the specific target campaign/ad group/keyword IDs and decide whether to tune Late Night negatives/bids, fix Dinner/Brand delivery, or resume PMax; preserve rollback plan and current budgets.

pos-write.title: 09 POS Write
pos-write.last_task: Captain POS session-expired gap + refund audit
pos-write.last_summary: Deep-audited Captain POS operational issue on HE production test.hamzahotel.com after tablet showed Odoo Server Error / Session expired during payment validation. Verified this was Captain-only: Cash and Ground POS sales continued, Captain config/session/pricelists/payment methods remained healthy, and V2 Captain offer pricing itself was correct. Found Captain backend sequence 2670-6 had local/server save gaps after repeated stale-tab payment attempts: user water test saved as 2670-6-000006, photographed ₹746.35 order was later re-entered and saved as 2670-6-000005 with matching lines/table/payment, leaving only 2670-6-000004 unresolved. May 1-current Captain sequence audit found historical missing 2662-6-000127 between 20 May 2026 03:05:54 IST and 14:38:26 IST, likely around previous-day closing/new-session transition. Read-only audited refund order 8059: HE - Captain - 000035 REFUND is currently a paid negative refund for -₹125 at 25 May 2026 03:03 IST, linked to original order 7731 from 22 May 2026; user explicitly stopped any correction, so no write was performed.
pos-write.next_action: Do not mutate refund order 8059 unless Nihaf explicitly resumes and confirms. Operationally, staff must confirm whether 2670-6-000004 was a real second bill or just a failed duplicate local slot; if real, re-enter that bill from staff/KDS/payment evidence. For Captain tablets, close stale POS tabs, reload/login fresh before payment validation, then verify new Captain order sequence saves in backend.
pos-write.mutation_status: No new mutation in this follow-up. Read-only Odoo/POS audits only; previous V2 pricelist mutation remains unchanged. Refund 8059 was not modified because user said wait/don't do anything.

packaging-design.title: 10 Packaging Design
packaging-design.last_summary: Initialized lane from live memory, packaging prompt, unified control graph, packaging Claude digest, HE Cheap-Bold doctrine, NCH flask Codex handoff, and local asset state. Packaging scope remains creative/vendor handoff only. HE current open work is corrected Cheap-Bold v2 renders: heritage burgundy direct-print pouches, kraft single-burgundy boxes/sleeves, unchanged cups with small lid sticker, tote as large brand surface; no foil/gold/emboss/photo-print/premium traps. NCH flask current open work is panel-by-panel continuation from approved front/back references and Downloads/_flask_bg locked bases; April automated vendor pack remains rejected, and final output must not use bulk SVG visible-art automation or generative panels.
packaging-design.next_action: When Nihaf gives the target, either regenerate one HE Cheap-Bold corrected render/state at a time, or continue NCH flask one approved panel at a time. For NCH, first confirm legal text/phone/FSSAI/ingredients and the /go/flask QR redirect before print handoff; use rsvg-convert/Python only for dieline, QR, bleed, and PDF assembly.
packaging-design.mutation_status: No artwork, Odoo, ad, WABA, aggregator, vendor, or customer-facing packaging mutation. Only packaging-design execution memory was updated and synced to ops/marketing-control/state.json.

events.task: Captain POS session-expired gap + refund audit
events.summary: Deep-audited Captain POS operational issue on HE production test.hamzahotel.com after tablet showed Odoo Server Error / Session expired during payment validation. Verified this was Captain-only: Cash and Ground POS sales continued, Captain config/session/pricelists/payment methods remained healthy, and V2 Captain offer pricing itself was correct. Found Captain backend sequence 2670-6 had local/server save gaps after repeated stale-tab payment attempts: user water test saved as 2670-6-000006, photographed ₹746.35 order was later re-entered and saved as 2670-6-000005 with matching lines/table/payment, leaving only 2670-6-000004 unresolved. May 1-current Captain sequence audit found historical missing 2662-6-000127 between 20 May 2026 03:05:54 IST and 14:38:26 IST, likely around previous-day closing/new-session transition. Read-only audited refund order 8059: HE - Captain - 000035 REFUND is currently a paid negative refund for -₹125 at 25 May 2026 03:03 IST, linked to original order 7731 from 22 May 2026; user explicitly stopped any correction, so no write was performed.
events.next_action: Do not mutate refund order 8059 unless Nihaf explicitly resumes and confirms. Operationally, staff must confirm whether 2670-6-000004 was a real second bill or just a failed duplicate local slot; if real, re-enter that bill from staff/KDS/payment evidence. For Captain tablets, close stale POS tabs, reload/login fresh before payment validation, then verify new Captain order sequence saves in backend.
events.mutation_status: No new mutation in this follow-up. Read-only Odoo/POS audits only; previous V2 pricelist mutation remains unchanged. Refund 8059 was not modified because user said wait/don't do anything.

events.task: Verify re-entry status for two missing Captain orders
events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo check after staff/user action shows the photographed ₹746.35 Captain bill has now been entered and paid as backend order id 8055, reference 2670-6-000005, table First Floor Dine-In 6, pricelist 45, payment HE UPI ₹746.35 at 2026-05-25 02:55:45 IST, with exact photo lines. Current 2670-6 backend sequence present [1,2,3,5,6]; only 2670-6-000004 remains missing. Therefore one of the two missing sequence slots is reconciled; the remaining slot may be a duplicate failed attempt or another real missed bill and needs staff confirmation.
events.next_action: Ask staff whether there was any second real Captain bill after 23:20 IST besides the ₹746.35 bill and water test. If no, mark 2670-6-000004 as failed duplicate/local retry only; if yes, re-enter that second bill.
events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation by Codex. Staff/user re-entered ₹746.35 bill as 2670-6-000005.

events.task: May Captain POS sequence gap audit
events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo sequence audit from 2026-05-01 UTC through current time found 352 backend Captain orders across 10 Captain reference groups. Only two Captain reference groups have backend sequence gaps: historical 2662-6 missing 000127 between 000126 on 2026-05-19 21:35:54 UTC and 000128 on 2026-05-20 09:08:26 UTC; current 2670-6 missing 000004 and 000005 between 000003 at 2026-05-24 17:48:25 UTC and test water order 000006 at 2026-05-24 21:19:08 UTC. Current incident therefore accounts for exactly two missing Captain sequence slots; total Captain missing sequence slots since May 1 within backend-seen ranges is three.
events.next_action: Reconcile current 2670-6-000004/000005 from staff/UPI/KDS/table memory; optionally separately investigate historical 2662-6-000127 around 2026-05-20 morning if finance wants full May exception cleanup.
events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only sequence audit only.

events.task: Count missing Captain POS sequences after test order
events.summary: After user placed a live Captain water test order paid by UPI, read-only HE Odoo check shows it saved as pos.order id 8052, reference 2670-6-000006, total ₹20.01, table First Floor Dine-In 4, pricelist 40. Backend sequence group 2670-6 now has 000001, 000002, 000003, 000006 with missing references 000004 and 000005. Therefore two Captain local POS sequence slots were consumed but not recorded in backend pos.order/payment/KDS. At least one is the photographed ₹746.35 failed order; the second may be either another real missed bill or a duplicate failed re-entry attempt for the same bill, requiring staff/UPI/KDS/table confirmation.
events.next_action: Ask staff to reconcile exactly two missing Captain sequence slots: identify what orders 2670-6-000004 and 2670-6-000005 corresponded to after 23:20 IST, using memory, UPI history, table served, and kitchen/KDS. Do not clear remaining Captain site data until reconciliation is complete.
events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation by Codex. User-created live test order 2670-6-000006 confirmed backend sync recovered.

events.task: Deep debug Captain-only POS session-expired outage
events.summary: Read-only HE Odoo audit confirmed issue is Captain-only, not all POS and not server-wide. Cash Counter and Ground Floor continued creating pos.order/pos.payment and KDS prep records after Captain stopped. Captain config 6/session 269 is still opened and correctly configured with default pricelist 40 and available [40,45]; V2 orders were successfully recorded after the pricelist switch (e.g. Captain paid orders 7994/8001/8003 on pricelist 45), proving deployment did not break config 6. After Captain latest paid order 7994 at 2026-05-24 17:50:33 UTC (23:20 IST), there are no Captain pos.order, pos.payment, or prep/KDS records for the repeated failed attempts. Repeated same error means staff kept re-entering inside the same stale/expired Captain browser auth session; frontend can render POS from local browser state, but backend rejects validation with Session expired.
events.next_action: Recover Captain by preserving tablet local POS data first: do not clear site data initially; login fresh to test.hamzahotel.com in same Chrome/profile, return/refresh Captain POS and sync/recover pending orders. If still blocked, open Captain POS config 6 on a different fresh browser/device for live service and quarantine the stale tablet until unsynced orders are reconciled/cancelled to avoid duplicate later sync.
events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only pos.order/pos.payment/pos.session/pos.prep audit only.

events.task: Audit whether Captain POS session-expired order was recorded
events.summary: Ran read-only HE Odoo JSON-RPC audits on test.hamzahotel.com for tablet photos at 2026-05-25 02:05-02:09 IST. Config 6 is HE - Captain, current session 269 opened, default pricelist 40, available [40,45], payment methods [19,52,57,58]. No pos.order found for exact total ₹746.35 in 2026-05-24 19:45-21:15 UTC, no photo-like order lines, no pos.payment around ₹746.35, and recent Captain backend orders stop at 2026-05-24 17:50:33 UTC (23:20 IST). Conclusion: suspected order was not recorded as a backend POS sale/payment; it likely remained only in the tablet browser because payment validation failed after Odoo web session expiry.
events.next_action: Recover/recreate from the tablet order screen if still visible; hard refresh/reopen Captain POS/login, then validate again. If UPI was already collected externally, enter the recovered/recreated order with HE UPI and note the incident; do not assume backend sale exists.
events.mutation_status: No Odoo mutation. Read-only pos.order/pos.payment/pos.session audit only.

events.task: Diagnose Captain POS session expired tablet error
events.summary: Analyzed tablet photos from HE Captain POS after V2 pricelist switch. The visible Chicken Kabab Half price ₹198.60 matches the expected V2 canary, so pricing/pricelist deployment is behaving. The failure shown is Odoo Server Error: Session expired during payment validation, which points to browser/Odoo auth/session expiry or stale POS tab, not the last pricelist/config deployment. No Odoo mutation performed.
events.next_action: Staff should press OK, refresh/reopen Captain POS, recover the draft order from table/orders if present, then validate again. If repeated, run read-only live session/payment audit before any write.
events.mutation_status: No mutation. Read-only image-based diagnosis only; last Odoo mutation remains Captain config 6 [40,45] and pricelist 45 from 2026-05-24.

events.task: HE Captain POS 10% offer V2 fix
events.summary: Diagnosed Captain POS offer bug on test.hamzahotel.com: old offer 44 chained through Captain base pricelist 40 and dropped portion attribute extras, causing apparent 45-55% discounts. Created pricelist 45 HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 with 168 non-chained rules, switched only Captain config 6 from [40,44] to [40,45], verified Cash [41,42] and Ground [41,43] unchanged, and post-switch exhaustive variant audit passed 252 cases with 0 anomalies.
events.next_action: Staff should reload Captain POS and select HE Captain AC 10% Offer V2 - 2026-05-24 for new Captain offer orders; verify tablet canaries Chicken Kabab Half about ₹198.60, Chicken Kabab Full about ₹400.30, Irani Chicken Full about ₹522.34. Rollback if needed: restore Captain config 6 available pricelists to [40,44].
events.mutation_status: Odoo/POS production mutation completed on HE test.hamzahotel.com: created detached pricelist 45 + 168 rules, then updated only pos.config 6 available_pricelist_ids to [40,45]. No product/tax/category/KDS/session/Cash/Ground writes. Backups: /private/tmp/he_captain_offer_v2_write_backup_20260524.json and /private/tmp/he_captain_v2_live_switch_backup_20260524.json.

events.next_action: Use pos-write terminal to diagnose HE POS discount/offer issue before mutation.
